message:
test: add 8 E2E stress scenarios for large datasets and transitions (2dccg.11.7)

Stress tests covering: 500-hit dataset at all degradation levels,
rapid theme switching (20 toggles), degradation×density cross matrix,
responsive width sweep (40-200 cols), interleaved transitions,
scroll with help overlay, long-content hits (200-char titles, 1K-line
content), and a 3s perf gate. All deterministic with fixed fixtures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
